description_long: This is a modern, minimalist bed frame constructed primarily from metal with a sleek, black finish. The frame features vertical and horizontal bars forming a slatted design on the sides and back, providing both structural support and a contemporary aesthetic. The base is flat and solid, likely designed to support a mattress, but no mattress or bedding is present. The open, airy structure allows visibility through the sides and back, making it suitable for urban environments where durability and easy maintenance are important. The bed sits on a tubular metal base that elevates it slightly off the ground, enhancing airflow and ease of cleaning underneath. Its overall appearance is utilitarian yet stylish, fitting well in public or semi-public urban spaces.
description: A sleek, black metal bed frame with a slatted, open design and no visible mattress or bedding. Its minimalist, sturdy construction is ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open slatted headboard and the solid base platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the frame and the parallel slats along the side rails.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same slatted design and solid base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the side slats and frame depth.
